mainEntity.name: How to handle workers' comp if injured at temporary staffing agency in Draper?
mainEntity.text: How to handle workers' comp if injured at temporary staffing agency in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify agency and client employer immediately; benefits from responsible party with coverage.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah joint liability; general employer (agency) primary. Coordinate dual reports. Common in warehousing; clarify coverage disputes early.

name: Temp Agency Work Injuries in Utah
description: Notify agency and client employer immediately; benefits from responsible party with coverage.
